## Summary

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
# Commands or API calls to reproduce
curl -X POST "https://provenance-gateway.dev.datafund.io/api/v1/..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}'
```

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead. Include the full response if applicable.

## Environment

- Gateway: production / staging / local
- x402 enabled: yes / no
